acceptance_targets: [chapter_14_craft_001] Pass if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:19, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:153, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:307, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:337 let the reader infer the human-scale stakes from objects, behavior, and Owen's action, with no more than one abstract narrator gloss restating that thesis across those cited beats. Fail if those spans still translate the scene into essay-language after the detail already made the point.

[chapter_14_dialogue_001] Pass if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:105 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:150 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:239 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:250 give both Prue and Tallow at least one self-correction, interruption, or abandoned clause under pressure, and no speaker delivers more than two consecutive sentences of abstract moral summary without repair or pushback. Fail if those spans still read like polished standalone quotations.

[FA-003] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4242-4308 still communicates the same moral content but now sounds like two strained teenagers talking on a windy path, not like finished copy. Fail if the passage still offers a run of crisp quotable verdicts with little friction in delivery.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:19, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:153, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:307, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:337 let the reader infer the human-scale stakes from objects, behavior, and Owen's action, with no more than one abstract narrator gloss restating that thesis across those cited beats. Fail if those spans still translate the scene into essay-language after the detail already made the point.
findings.problem: The narration repeatedly restates the chapter's ordinary-life-versus-hidden-labor thesis in abstract language after the concrete school detail has already dramatized it. That makes the chapter explain its own meaning instead of letting the greenhouse, hall, kitchen, and common-room material carry the pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:19, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:153, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:307, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:337 so those beats stay in observed school detail and immediate choice. Keep the essay, bread, slow clock, and turn at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:355, but cut or concretize the explanatory glosses about ordinary life, scale, and the 'human bargain.'

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:105 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:150 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:239 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:250 give both Prue and Tallow at least one self-correction, interruption, or abandoned clause under pressure, and no speaker delivers more than two consecutive sentences of abstract moral summary without repair or pushback. Fail if those spans still read like polished standalone quotations.
findings.problem: Under pressure, Prue and Tallow keep landing balanced, quotable moral mini-speeches instead of speech with friction. That pushes multiple voices toward the narrator's essay register and conflicts with the style-bible guidance that Prue should restart and re-angle under strain while Tallow should stay task-rooted rather than sounding like an oracle.
findings.rewrite_direction: Roughen snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:105, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:109, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:133, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:181, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:199, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:239, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:249 by breaking long turns into interrupted exchange, self-correction, or concrete complaint. Let Prue's compromise come through string, notebook, and bodily strain, and let Tallow's rebuke stay in spoons, potatoes, routes, and house-maintenance logic instead of aphoristic summary.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4242-4308 still communicates the same moral content but now sounds like two strained teenagers talking on a windy path, not like finished copy. Fail if the passage still offers a run of crisp quotable verdicts with little friction in delivery.
findings.problem: The lake-path confrontation converts high emotional risk into literary polish. In snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4242-4308, Prue repeatedly lands exact, quotable clarifications and Owen repeatedly answers in neat thesis-language, so the scene starts reading as elegant argument summary rather than two adolescents failing to say this cleanly in real time.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4242-4308 to preserve Prue's intelligence and Owen's evasive logic while roughening the speech surface. Let at least one of Prue's cleanest verdict-lines fail, restart, or get interrupted by the walk or the cold; let Owen dodge or mishear before he clarifies. Replace at least one of the most aphoristic sentences with messier, more spoken texture.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
